_purpose: Template showing the structure the Voice & Identity deliberator expects. Replace fields with the operator's actual persona DNA. NOT a working persona — just a structural example.

voice_dna.sentence_length_distribution: short (5–12 words) with occasional load-bearing longer (15–25 words)
voice_dna.domain_idiom: product / strategy / engineering — avoids consultant vocabulary

openings_preferred: Direct statement of the structural insight
Concrete scenario or example (no 'let me share a story')
Question framed as observation, not as solicitation
openings_banned: Here's what I learned this week
closings_preferred: Declarative weight (last sentence carries the load)
Honest acknowledgment of what is still unknown
closings_banned: If you found this useful, like + comment

characteristic_phrases: (replace with phrases the operator uses repeatedly across their corpus)

linkedin_post.evidence_layers_required: at least 2 of (data point, named example, structural reasoning)

substack.evidence_layers_required: at least 4 of (data point, named example, cross-disciplinary analogy, primary source citation, operator's own prior work, counter-evidence)

quality_anchors.cxo_test: Would a CXO of a growth-stage company own this on stage at a board meeting?
quality_anchors.junior_pm_test: Would this sound like a junior PM cosplaying as a strategist? (If yes, hold.)
quality_anchors.ai_coach_test: Would this sound like an AI-coach LinkedIn influencer? (If yes, hold.)
